zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bassett於大約1523年出生在英國戴文武波利時，她的父親Sir John Bassett62歲，母親Honor Grenville35歲。她於1557年6月8日與John Wollacomb II在英國戴文阿黑林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年5月21日在英國戴文洛波洛享年76歲，埋葬在英國戴文洛波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bassett于大约1523年出生在英国戴文武波利时，她的父亲Sir John Bassett62岁，母亲Honor Grenville35岁。她于1557年6月8日与John Wollacomb II在英国戴文阿黑林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年5月21日在英国戴文洛波洛享年76岁，埋葬在英国戴文洛波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bassett was born about 1523, in Umberleigh, Devon, England, her father, Sir John Bassett, was 62 and her mother, Honor Grenville, was 35. She married John Wollacomb II on 8 June 1557, in Atherington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 21 May 1598, in Roborough, Devon, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Roborough, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bassett est née environ 1523, à Umberleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bassett, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Honor Grenville, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Wollacomb II le 8 juin 1557, à Atherington, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1598, à Roborough, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Roborough, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Bassett um 1523 in Umberleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Bassett 62 und ihre Mutter Honor Grenville 35. Sie hat am 8. Juni 1557 in Atherington, Devon, England John Wollacomb II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1598 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Roborough, Devon, England und wurde in Roborough, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bassett è nata il circa 1523 nel Umberleigh, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir John Bassett, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Honor Grenville, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John Wollacomb II il 8 giugno 1557, nel Atherington, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1598, nel Roborough, Devon, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Roborough, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bassettが約1523年にイギリスデボンウンバーレイグで生まれた時，父Sir John Bassettは62歳，母Honor Grenvilleは35歳であった。1557年6月8日にイギリスデボンアスエリントンでJohn Wollacomb IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年5月21日にイギリスデボンロボロウで76歳で死去し，イギリスデボンロボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bassett(이)가 대략 1523년 영국 데폰 벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Bassett(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Honor Grenville(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1557년 6월 8일 영국 데폰 앳헤링턴에서 John Wollacomb II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 5월 21일 영국 데폰 로버루그h에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 로버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bassett nasceu aproximadamente 1523, em Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bassett, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Honor Grenville, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wollacomb II em 8 de junho de 1557, em Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de maio de 1598, em Roborough, Devon, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Roborough, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bassett родилась около 1523 г. в местности умбирлиг, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Bassett было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Honor Grenville, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wollacomb II 8 июня 1557 г. в местности атирингтон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 мая 1598 г. в местности робороую, девон, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности робороую, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Bassett nació aproximadamente 1523, en Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bassett, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Honor Grenville, tenía 35 años. Se casó con John Wollacomb II el 8 de junio de 1557, en Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1598, en Roborough, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Roborough, Devon, Inglaterra.
